package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for mapper_outside_mapper_package_when_repo_uses_mappers: Mapper functions scattered across handlers and services when the repo already has a dedicated mapping package.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule082NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule082NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule082NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario082Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule082NegativeService, input Rule082NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
